task_completion.description: Verify that work-related bookmarks are organized into the specified folders and personal bookmarks are deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks). You should see folders named 'Compliance', 'Quality & Lab', 'Raw Materials', and 'Telemetry'. There should be no visible bookmarks for ESPN, Netflix, Spotify, Facebook, Reddit, DraftKings, or Twitter.

task_completion.description: Verify that notifications are allowed for the specified URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Site Settings for Notifications (chrome://settings/content/notifications). Under the 'Allowed to send notifications' section, both 'https://www.precisionfermentation.com' and 'https://www.goekos.com' must be listed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the default page zoom is set to 125%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Appearance settings (chrome://settings/appearance). The 'Page zoom' dropdown must be set to '125%'.

task_completion.description: Verify the default download location and prompt settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Downloads settings (chrome://settings/downloads). The 'Location' must be set to '/home/ga/Documents/Batch_Logs' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' must be turned OFF.

task_completion.description: Verify that the custom site search for Yakima Chief is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Search Engine settings (chrome://settings/searchEngines). Under 'Site search', there must be an entry for Yakima Chief with the shortcut 'hop' and the URL 'https://shop.yakimachief.com/catalogsearch/result/?q=%s'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specific startup page is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome 'On startup' settings (chrome://settings/onStartup). The option 'Open a specific page or set of pages' must be selected, and 'https://www.precisionfermentation.com' must be listed as the page to open.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Chrome browser GUI to configure settings rather than editing configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser window open to various chrome://settings or chrome://bookmarks pages, rather than a terminal or text editor modifying Chrome's JSON preference files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Google Chrome application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard Chrome UI elements (address bar, settings sidebar, bookmark manager interface) rather than mockups or text files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use scripts to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible running bash or Python scripts to forcefully inject the bookmarks or settings into the Chrome profile.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The programmatic verifier for this task is missing from the environment, making visual verification of the screenshots the only way to score the task. Ensure the following exact strings and settings are present in the Chrome UI: Folders ('Compliance', 'Quality & Lab', 'Raw Materials', 'Telemetry'); Deleted (ESPN, Netflix, Spotify, Facebook, Reddit, DraftKings, Twitter); Notifications ('https://www.precisionfermentation.com', 'https://www.goekos.com'); Zoom (125%); Download Path ('/home/ga/Documents/Batch_Logs'); Site Search (Yakima Chief, shortcut 'hop', URL 'https://shop.yakimachief.com/catalogsearch/result/?q=%s'); Startup ('https://www.precisionfermentation.com').
